text: KILLWAGER FLASH: Harlow operators spotted moving through Sector 7. Odds on a clean sweep: 3:1. Place your bets.
BREAKING: Manticor Borz column sighted near the Scatter. Ubiytsa forward elements confirmed. Stay off the main roads.
KILLWAGER UPDATE: Last night's raid on the Authority checkpoint netted 4 crates of Abolite. Headless operatives claim responsibility.
UTG pair confirmed KIA in the Frontier Desert. Golem unit recovered intact. Authority is offering double bounty for the shooters.
RUMOR: Task Force Boone establishing forward operating base in the foothills. EMP residue still scrambling comms in the area.
Ash storm warning for the Cenriv Complex. Pollux Phase approaching. Stock up or dig in.
KILLWAGER ODDS: Chimera vs. Authority at Fort Hope -- Chimera 2:1 underdogs. Disciples spotted with heavy augmentation rigs.
Sabra runners intercepted carrying med supplies to the Scatter. Authority claims contraband. Headless says humanitarian aid. You decide.
ORK Strzyga team went dark near Mokhri Pat three days ago. P3 offering premium for any intel on their status.
KILLWAGER FLASH: 3rd Battalion Peacemaker drone disabled by EMP. Boone VAT element suspected. Odds on retaliation strike: Even money.
Banak extraction team pulled something out of the quarantine zone. Authority wants it back. Badly.
WEATHER: Castor Phase holding. Enjoy the sun while it lasts. Pollux projections show 6-week blackout incoming.
Ideres Rams migrating south early this year. Old-timers say that means a bad Pollux. Load your mags.
KILLWAGER PAYOUT: Last week's server defense bet paid 8:1 for the underdog. Someone in the Scatter is very rich tonight.
Criket drones spotted doing recon sweeps near New Damascus. Harlow Engineers can't be far behind.
AUTHORITY BROADCAST: Curfew extended. All citizens must present valid SSSA documentation at checkpoints. Non-compliance will be met with force.
Glow Moss prices up 40% after cave collapse near Ethron. Underground farmers scrambling.
KILLWAGER: Manticor Bratva team challenged a Boone recon element near The Thorn. No survivors reported. Bets still open on who walked away.
Sand Strider migration blocking Route 9. Convoys rerouting through Razor Grass country. Bring bandages.
Remember Gaia. Remember the yellow dress. The Authority doesn't want you to. -- IRAFEL broadcast, frequency unknown
